full_function:
def cmd_read_and_extract_text_from_a_pdf_file(session_id: str):
    """
    read and extract text from a PDF file

    LLM-implemented via qwen3:8b by forge-command-implement
    """
    from agents.forge.memory import write_audit_entry
    scope = Path(get_session_paths()[0])
    results = [str(p.relative_to(scope)) for p in scope.rglob('*.pdf') if not p.name.startswith('.')]
    print()
    print('── read and extract text from a PDF fi ──')
    for item in results:
        print(f'  {item}')  
    print()
    write_audit_entry(session_id, 'CMD_READ_AND_EXTRACT_TEXT_FROM_A_PDF_FILE_EXECUTED', str(scope), str(len(results)), 'done')
